terms.context_quote: Quantum Overlap {Superposition} is fragile and vanishes due to environmental interactions
terms.usefulness: Helps visualize superposition as a fragile, overlapping state that dissolves with environmental interaction
terms.risk: May imply physical 'overlap' rather than abstract quantum state properties

terms.context_quote: When a quantum system interacts with its environment... it becomes entangled with those environmental 'noise' {decoherence}
terms.usefulness: Makes decoherence tangible as a result of environmental interference
terms.risk: Could mislead into thinking 'noise' is random rather than structured quantum entanglement
